output: {"fix": "handleNodeUpdate bug in WorkflowCanvas.tsx", "issue": "selectedNode state was not updated when node data changed, causing InspectorPanel to not reflect updates", "solution": "Added setSelectedNode call in handleNodeUpdate to sync selectedNode when the updated node is currently selected", "code_change": "setSelectedNode((prev) => prev && prev.id === nodeId ? { ...prev, data: { ...prev.data, ...data } } : prev);", "build_status": "passed", "tests": "n/a"}
